The '''Scimitar assault bomber''', also known as the '''TIE Scimitar Assault Bomber''',<ref name="Special Military Unit Intelligence Update">{{JournalCite|15|Special Military Unit Intelligence Update}}</ref> was an advanced [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]]/[[Bomber/Legends|bomber]] based on [[TIE series/Legends|TIE Series]] technology. It was used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:ScimitarBomber_egvv.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Scimitar [[:Category:Technical drawing images|schematics]].]]

The Scimitar assault bomber had a single elongated body, and the pilot and gunner sat in a forward, shaped module which could eject from the craft and serve as an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]]. The fuselage was supported by two large elongated array wings on either side. Interlocked [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] thrusters provided it with additional maneuverability.

In space, the Scimitar assault bomber was faster than any TIE Bomber, and, in planetary atmospheres, it could travel at 1,150 km per hour, with its dive-bombing speed an additional 100 km per hour faster.

It was 13.8 meters long, and thus longer than the standard [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]]. Its weapons included two [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] launchers, and chutes for [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]] and [[Proton grenade/Legends|proton grenades]]. However, instead of two ion engines, it only had one, thus the lack of the prefix TIE. It was designed to bomb planets into submission.

==History==
[[File:Scimitar_cockpit_module_FF86.jpg|thumb|left|180px|A Scimitar cockpit module [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]].]]

The Scimitar was originally conceived as an upgrade to the [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bomber]] per [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Tomax Bren/Legends|Tomax Bren's]] specifications as the [[TIE Bomber Mark 2]] but this upgrade wasn't approved. When [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] rose to power, he approved a modified version of Bren's design and had it put into production.<ref name="Special Military Unit Intelligence Update" />

[[Kir Kanos]] used a Scimitar to destroy ''[[Emperor's Revenge]]'' above [[Yinchorr/Legends|Yinchorr]]. He programmed an [[APA-5 droid|APA-5 mess hall droid]] to self-destruct the bomber in the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer's]] hangar bay, killing everyone aboard the [[Warship/Legends|warship]].

The ships were also used during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. A full squadron was considered one of the elite Galactic Alliance squadrons by the time of the war's final [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar|battle]] over [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].
